docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ROBERT MINARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LACHANDRA DUNN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MINARD, ROBERT  - R/O IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUNN, LACHANDRA  - DRIVER PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE IN A YEARS LONG RELATIONSHIP AND PLAINTIFF'S PROMISE TO PAY FOR THE DAMAGE TO HIS VEHICLE CAUSED BY DEFENDANT AROSE FROM THAT RELATIONSHIP WHICH IS THE CONSIDERATION FOR PLAINTIFF'S PROMISE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE WAS NOT STATED SERVED JUN-13-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUNN, LACHANDRA  - DRIVER
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY MINARD, ROBERT  - R/O AS TO DEFENDANT DUNN, LACHANDRA  - DRIVER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
